segments.text: if you are an ambitious procrastinator keep listening the unhappiest people on Earth are the people who have the
biggest Ambitions but they put the least amount of effort possible there's a big gap between what you want and what your
reality is your ideal future reality and your current reality are very different
and that Gap is what's causing you this suffering now this is what you do next think about your umbrella goal put a time limit to it break it down into
smaller pieces until you find a piece small enough that makes you want to start today
